subcodes.first_line: We have desired to make mention of Our loved ones, as a token of grace from Us - and verily We are the Ancient Bestower - that the Call may draw them unto Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر اولیائی فضلا من عندی و انا الفضال القدیم لیجذبهم الندآء الی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement
